name: Zucchini and Tomato Fans
recipeInstructions:
1. PREHEAT OVEN TO 400°F.
2. Wash tomatoes and cut each lengthwise into 4 slices. Wash zucchini and trim off flower ends. Starting at the flower end, cut each zucchini lengthwise into 1/4-inch slices, leaving slices attached at the other end so they can be opened like a fan. Each zucchini should have 4 slits.
3. Arrange zucchini side by side in a lightly oiled roasting pan, with enough space in between them to fan out. Slide a slice of tomato into each slit and press down firmly on the zucchini to create a fan with alternating segments of zucchini and tomato.
4. Cut each garlic clove lengthwise into 8 thin slices; slide slices into fans alongside tomato slices. Brush entire surface of fans with oil, and sprinkle salt, pepper, and herbes de Provence on top.
5. Bake for 30 minutes, or until vegetables are soft and fans are nicely browned on top. Using a large spatula, transfer fans to 4 plates. Serve immediately.
